name: Levy Stay for Divisible Tax Litigation

eligibility.description: Requires the taxpayer to pay a portion of the divisible tax and file a suit for refund in Federal court.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prohibits the IRS from levying on property during the pendency of a refund suit for 'divisible taxes' (like employment taxes or trust fund recovery penalties).
